name.namePart: C. V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley
加州大学柏克莱分校东亚图书馆

mads.note: Chinese Rubbings Collection: 2,745 rubbing items of mainland Chinese stone inscriptions (Zhou–Qing) on the library's Invenio platform (digicoll.lib.berkeley.edu). Native CJK search; images are local JPEG (no public IIIF/API as of 2026).
